requestId.description: Required: Unique identifier for the requested service related to the transaction.

transportUnitIdentifier.description: Required: UUID of entity performing the transport.

netn.TransportEmbarkmentStatus.description: Is sent by the service provider federate, to inform the service consumer of the embarkment state, after the ServiceStarted interaction

embarkedObjects.description: Required: List of entities currently embarked. Updated during embarkment.

requestId.description: Required: Unique identifier for the requested service related to the transaction.

transportUnitIdentifier.description: Required: Referens to entity providing the transport.

netn.TreatmentStruct.description: Defines the properties for a CBRN treatment.

duration.description: Duration in seconds for which this treatment will remain effective.

effectiveness.description: Percentage by which this treatment reduces effects.

treatableAgents.description: Array of agents that can be treated using this treatment.

treatmentWindow.description: The time window in seconds between exposure and treatment for which this treatment is effective.

netn.TroposphereLayer.description: If overlapping Atmospheric Conditions exist the following merging rules apply:  Humidity, AirTemperature and BarometricPressure are calculated as the average of the overlapping conditions.  Visibility is calculated as the minimum visibility distance of the overlapping conditions.  A TroposhpereLayer instance without a GeoReference is considered global within its specified Layer.

cloud.description: Optional. Data about Clouds in the Atmospheric layer. Default is no clouds. If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist, the cloud condition in the overlapping region is determined by the latest updated value.

layer.description: Optional. Volume of atmosphere extending from a base altitude upwards (see LayerStruct). Any portion of the Layer extending below sea level is ignored. If Layer is not provided, it is considered to extend from the surface of the earth upward indefinitely.

netn.TroposphereLayerCondition.description: Response with environment condition in volume of air.

barometricPressure.description: Optional. Average barometric pressure measured in millibar or hectopascal (1 mbar = 1hPa) in the region/location.

environmentObjectId.description: Optional. Reference to an existing environment condition object if the corresponding request includes UpdateAsObject set to true.

eventId.description: Required: Unique identifier of the request. Will be referenced in a resulting resulting METOC_Response interaction.

geoReference.description: Optional. Geographical reference to indicate for which point, area, path or object this request is related to. Default if not provided the environment condition data is global.

haze.description: Optional. Average haze density in the region/location,

humidity.description: Optional. Average humidity in percent in the region/location.

precipitation.description: Optional. Average precipitation intensisty region/location for a precipitation type in the following order of precedence Snow, Hail, Rain, NoPrecipitation.

status.description: Required: Specifies the result of the request action. TRUE indicates success.

temperature.description: Optional. Average temperature in the region/location.

visibilityRange.description: Optional. Average distance at which an object or light can be clearly discerned by the human eye in the region/location.

wind.description: Optional. Average wind speed and direction in the region/location.

netn.TurnToHeading.description: Tasking of an entity to turn to the specified heading.

communicationNetworkIds.description: Optional. Reference to communication networks (NETN-COM) used to transfer tasking messages. If not provided, the task transmission should not be modelled and federates should receive and act on the task messages directly.

heading.description: Required. The heading an entity has to turn to.

startWhen.description: Required. Time when the task execution should start. Use the value 00000000000000.000 to indicate that the time is undefined.

taskId.description: Required. Uniqie identifier for the task.

taskee.description: Required. Reference to the entity that will execute the task.

tasker.description: Optional. Callsign of the commander of the task. If missing, the commander is undefined.

why.description: Optional. A text describing the reason for this task.

netn.TurnToOrientation.description: Tasking of an entity to rotate to a specified orientation, including pitch and roll.

communicationNetworkIds.description: Optional. Reference to communication networks (NETN-COM) used to transfer tasking messages. If not provided, the task transmission should not be modelled and federates should receive and act on the task messages directly.

heading.description: Required. The heading an entity has to turn to.

pitch.description: Required. Defines the angle ot the pitch.

roll.description: Required. Defines the angle ot the roll.

startWhen.description: Required. Time when the task execution should start. Use the value 00000000000000.000 to indicate that the time is undefined.

taskId.description: Required. Uniqie identifier for the task.

taskee.description: Required. Reference to the entity that will execute the task.

tasker.description: Optional. Callsign of the commander of the task. If missing, the commander is undefined.

why.description: Optional. A text describing the reason for this task.

netn.UUID.description: 4122, section 4.1.2 using 16 bytes. Also referred to as Variant 1 or RFC 4122/DCE 1.1 UUIDs.    For example, 00112233-4455-8877-6699-aabbccddeeff is encoded as the bytes 00 11 22 33 44 55 88 77 66 99 aa bb cc dd ee ff.

netn.UnderAttackStatusReport.description: Report from a unit that it is under attack.

comments.description: Optional. Any additional comments associated with the report.

communicationNetworkIds.description: Optional. Reference to communication networks (NETN-COM) used to transfer report messages. If not provided, the report transmission should not be modelled and federates should receive and act on the report messages directly.

entityId.description: Required. The entity that is reported about.

fromDirection.description: Required. Direction from which the entity is attacked, between 0..2π or -1 when not specified.

reportId.description: Required. Uniqie identifier for the report.

severeness.description: Required. Severeness of the attack upon the reporting entity.

when.description: Required. Date and time when the reported status was valid.

netn.Unit.description: Representation of an organizational unit based on attributes defined in the NETN-ORG extensions of MSDL.

communicationNetworks.description: Optional. Set of Communication Networks that the unit monitors and uses to communicate during a mission.

disposition.description: Required. Detailed positional information on unit.

echelon.description: Optional. Symbol modifier identifying the command level. Default NONE.

embarkedIn.description: Optional. A reference to a unit or equipment item which is carrying/transporting the unit. Default value is 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 (UUID with all zeros) indicating that the unit is not embarked in or mounted on any other unit or equipment.

entityType.description: Required. The entity type to use for representation of the unit as an aggregate entity. Entity types should be based on SISO-REF-010 and/or defined by federation agreements.

force.description: Optional. A reference to the Force that the unit belongs to. A missing value is interpreted as the force being unknown/undetermined.

holdings.description: Optional. A set of holdings of the unit. Default is an empty list.

isHq.description: Optional. Indicate whether the unit has a command function, e.g. if it is an HQ or not.

nameNonSen.description: Required. A unique name of the unit.

superiorUnit.description: Required. Reference to the superior unit. If this unit has no superior unit (i.e. is the top-unit) then the value of this attribute shall be 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 (UUID with all zeros).

symbolAmplification.description: Optional. Text amplifications for the unit's symbol. Static or very low update rate.

symbolId.description: Required. A symbol identifier represented as a string.

additionalInformation.description: A text amplifier for units, equipment and installations.

combatEffectiveness.description: A text amplifier for units and installations that indicates unit effectiveness or installation capability.

engagementBarText.description: A text amplifier placed immediately atop the symbol in the engagement bar. May denote, 1) local/remote status; 2) engagement status; and 3) weapon type.

evaluationRating.description: A text amplifier for units, equipment and installations that consists of a one-letter reliability rating and a one-number credibility rating.    Reliability Ratings:  A-completely reliable  B-usually reliable  C-fairly reliable  D-not usually reliable  E-unreliable  F-reliability cannot be judged    Credibility Ratings:  1-confirmed by other sources  2-probably true  3-possibly true  4-doubtfully true  5-improbable  6-truth cannot be judged.

higherFormation.description: A text amplifier for units that indicates number or title of higher echelon command (corps are designated by Roman numerals).

iffSifAis.description: A text amplifier displaying IFF/SIF/AIS identification modes and codes.

reinforcedOrReduced.description: A text amplifier in a unit symbol that displays (+) for reinforced, (-) for reduced, (±) reinforced and reduced.

specialHeadquarters.description: A text modifier for a unit's special C2 Headquarters.

staffComments.description: A text amplifier for units, equipment and installations.

uniqueDesignation.description: A text amplifier for units, equipment and installations that uniquely identifies a particular symbol or track number. Identifies acquisitions number when used with SIGINT symbology.

netn.UuidArrayOfHLAbyte16.description: Deprecated.    UUIDs are exchanged as a byte array and are encoded according to RFC    4122, section 4.1.2 using 16 bytes. Also referred to as Variant 1 or RFC 4122/DCE 1.1 UUIDs.    For example, 00112233-4455-8877-6699-aabbccddeeff is encoded as the bytes 00 11 22 33 44 55 88 77 66 99 aa bb cc dd ee ff.

netn.Vessel.description: This class defines additional attributes for vessel equipment.

imo.description: Optional. The International Maritime Organization (IMO) number to identify the vessel. If the value is not provided then the subscribing federate that is responsible for the modelling of the vessel shall generate a value.

dVOSignaturePercent.description: A summary percentage of an aggregates susceptibility to detection by direct view optics, i.e. the human eye, binoculars, or telescopes. A unit with zero percent signature would be concealed from DVO detection.

i2SignaturePercent.description: A summary percentage of an aggregates susceptibility to detection by Image Intensifying sensors. A unit with zero percent signature would be invisible to image intensifiers (I2).

thermalSignaturePercent.description: A summary percentage of an aggregates susceptibility to detection by thermal sensors. A unit with zero percent signature would be invisible to thermal sensors.

netn.Wait.description: Tasking of an entity to wait for a duration of time.

communicationNetworkIds.description: Optional. Reference to communication networks (NETN-COM) used to transfer tasking messages. If not provided, the task transmission should not be modelled and federates should receive and act on the task messages directly.

startWhen.description: Required. Time when the task execution should start. Use the value 00000000000000.000 to indicate that the time is undefined.

taskId.description: Required. Uniqie identifier for the task.

taskee.description: Required. Reference to the entity that will execute the task.

tasker.description: Optional. Callsign of the commander of the task. If missing, the commander is undefined.

why.description: Optional. A text describing the reason for this task.

netn.WaterSurface.description: Condition of sea surface in the specified region. An instance of this class without a GeoReference is considered to apply to all water surfaces.

current.description: Optional. Current on water surface. Default is no current. Ignored if surface has 100% Ice coverage. If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist, the current in the overlapping region is the average current direction and speed.

ice.description: Optional. Ice condition on surface. Default is no ice. If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist, the ice condition in the overlapping region is determined by the latest updated value.

salinity.description: Optional. Salinity of sea water on the practical salinity scale 1978 (PSS-78). Default value is 35 (equivalent to 35 parts per thousand). If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist the average salinity should be used.

seaState.description: Optional. State of sea surface. Default is Calm_glassy. If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist, the sea state in the overlapping region is determined by the latest updated value.

swell.description: Optional. Swell of the body of water. Default is no Swell. Ignored if surface has 100% Ice coverage. If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist, the swell condition in the overlapping region is determined by the latest updated value.

tide.description: Optional. The height of the current tide relative to MSL. Default is 0. If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist, the value for the overlapping region is the average Tide value.

wave.description: Optional. Waves on the water surface. Default is no waves. Ignored if surface has 100% Ice coverage. If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist, the wave condition in the overlapping region is determined by the latest updated value.

netn.WaterSurfaceCondition.description: Response with water surface condition data.

barometricPressure.description: Optional. Average barometric pressure measured in millibar or hectopascal (1 mbar = 1hPa) in the region/location.

current.description: Optional. Surface water Current direction and speed. N/A if Ice

environmentObjectId.description: Optional. Reference to an existing environment condition object if the corresponding request includes UpdateAsObject set to true.

eventId.description: Required: Unique identifier of the request. Will be referenced in a resulting resulting METOC_Response interaction.

geoReference.description: Optional. Geographical reference to indicate for which point, area, path or object this request is related to. Default if not provided the environment condition data is global.

haze.description: Optional. Average haze density in the region/location,

humidity.description: Optional. Average humidity in percent in the region/location.

ice.description: Optional. Ice conditions on the water surface.

precipitation.description: Optional. Average precipitation intensisty region/location for a precipitation type in the following order of precedence Snow, Hail, Rain, NoPrecipitation.

salinity.description: Optional. Salinity in the surface water.

status.description: Required: Specifies the result of the request action. TRUE indicates success.

swell.description: Optional. Surface water Swell data. N/A if Ice

temperature.description: Optional. Average temperature in the region/location.

tide.description: Optional. The height relative to the MSL.

visibilityRange.description: Optional. Average distance at which an object or light can be clearly discerned by the human eye in the region/location.

wave.description: Optional. Surface Wave data. N/A if Ice

wind.description: Optional. Average wind speed and direction in the region/location.

netn.WaveStruct.description: Water surface wave conditions and direction.

direction.description: The direction in which the wave propagates.

height.description: Average vertical distance between trough and crest produced by the wave.

length.description: Distance from a particular phase on a wave to the same phase on an adjacent wave.

period.description: Wave period is the distance between two waves passing through a stationary point, measured in seconds.

netn.Weather.description: Information about the general weather condition can be represented using WeatherCondition objects.  Common data such as Temperature, Wind and Precipitaion is represented but also details regarding Barometric Pressure and Humidity.  Information about Visual Range and Haze conditions can also be represented.  All attributes of WeatherCondition objects are optional.  An instance of this class without a GeoReference is considered global above sea level.

barometricPressure.description: Optional. Barometric pressure measured in millibar or hectopascal (1 mbar = 1hPa) in the region/location specified by the Environment Condition.  If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist the average barometric pressure should be used.

haze.description: Optional. Current Haze type and density in the region/location specified by the Environment Condition. Default is No Haze.  If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist having the same Haze type the average density should be used.

humidity.description: Optional. Humidity in percent in the region/location specified by the Environment Condition. Default is 75% (Normal value)  If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist the average humidity should be used.

precipitation.description: Optional. Current precipitation type and intensity in the region/location specified by the Environment Condition. Default is No Precipitation.  If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist the average intensity should be used.  Conflicting precipitation types are resolved according to the following precedence: Snow, Hail, Rain, No Precipitation.  E.g. If there is one overlapping Environment Condition with Snow the result is always Snow.

temperature.description: Optional. Temperature in the region/location specified by the EnvironmentCondition.  If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist the average temperature should be used.

visibilityRange.description: Optional. The distance at which an object or light can be clearly discerned by the human eye in the region/location specified by the Environment Condition.  If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist the minimum distance should be used.

wind.description: Optional. Wind speed and direction in the region/location specified by the EnvironmentCondition.  If EnvironmentConditions with overlapping regions/locations exist the average wind speed and direction should be used.

barometricPressure.description: Optional. Average barometric pressure measured in millibar or hectopascal (1 mbar = 1hPa) in the region/location.

environmentObjectId.description: Optional. Reference to an existing environment condition object if the corresponding request includes UpdateAsObject set to true.

precipitation.description: Optional. Average precipitation intensisty region/location for a precipitation type in the following order of precedence Snow, Hail, Rain, NoPrecipitation.

status.description: Required: Specifies the result of the request action. TRUE indicates success.

temperature.description: Optional. Average temperature in the region/location.

visibilityRange.description: Optional. Average distance at which an object or light can be clearly discerned by the human eye in the region/location.

wind.description: Optional. Average wind speed and direction in the region/location.

netn.WeatherModelTypeEnum32.description: Type of weather model used by a METOC service.

direction.description: Required: Direction in degrees clockwise from due north.

horizontalSpeed.description: Required: Wind speed (m/s) in the specified WindDirection.

verticalSpeed.description: Optional. Wind speed in m/s. Negative number is  a downdraft. Default is 0.

rpr.AccelerationMeterPerSecondSquaredFlo.description: Linear acceleration vector composed of SI base units. Based on the Linear Acceleration Vector record as specified in IEEE 1278.1-1995 section 5.2.33b.

rpr.AccelerationVectorStruct.description: The magnitude of the change in linear velocity over time.

xAcceleration.description: Acceleration component along the X axis.

yAcceleration.description: Acceleration component along the Y axis.

zAcceleration.description: Acceleration component along the Z axis.

rpr.Acknowledge.description: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of a SIMAN PDU from a Simulation Manager federate and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the federate has implemented the request.

acknowledgeFlag.description: The type of interaction being acknowledged.

originatingEntity.description: The DIS entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

receivingEntity.description: The DIS entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient of the interaction.

requestIdentifier.description: This field matches this response with the specific StartResume, StopFreeze, CreateEntity or RemoveEntity interaction sent by the simulation manager.

responseFlag.description: The type of response made to the interaction by the recipient.

rpr.AcknowledgeR.description: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of a SIMAN PDU, with a specified acknowledgement protocol, from a Simulation Manager federate and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the federate has implemented the request.

acknowledgeFlag.description: The type of interaction being acknowledged.

originatingEntity.description: The DIS entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

receivingEntity.description: The DIS entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient of the interaction.

requestIdentifier.description: This field matches this response with the specific StartResume, StopFreeze, CreateEntity or RemoveEntity interaction sent by the simulation manager.

rpr.AcousticTransient.description: Specifies the occurrence of a transient acoustic event such as torpedo tube floodings, hatch slams, and wrench drops.

activityCode.description: Index into a data base of transient acoustic events

activityParameter.description: The current state of the activity specified by the activity code

hostObjectIdentifier.description: The Object Instance ID of the object emitting the sound

relativePosition.description: The location of the sound relative to the hosts coordinate system

receivingEntity.description: The DIS entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient(s) of the interaction.

actionRequestCode.description: The action that the recipient(s) are intended to perform.

rpr.ActiveSonar.description: Describes the state of an active sonar system.

acousticName.description: Defines the type of sonar being represented.

acousticsIdentifier.description: Unique identifier for the sonar on an entity, Starts with 1

functionCode.description: Declares the current primary use of the sonar. It may be used by simulatons to infer intent.

rpr.ActiveSonarBeam.description: A sector of concentrated acoustic energy from an active sonar device.

activeEmissionParameterIndex.description: An index into the database of active (intentional) underwater acoustics emissions.

activeSonarIdentifier.description: The RTI ID of the ActiveSonar emitting this beam

azimuthBeamwidth.description: The horizontal width of the main beam (as opposed to any side lobes) measured from beam center to the 3 dB down point. Omni directional beams shall have a beam width of 0 radians.

azimuthCenter.description: The center azimuthal bearing of the main beam (as opposed to side lobes) in relation to the own ship heading, clockwise positive. Omnidirection beams shall have an azimuthal center of 0 radians.

beamIdentifier.description: The identification of the active sonar beam, which must be unique on the active sonar system.

elevationBeamwidth.description: Vertical angle from beam center to 3db down point. O is omnidirectional

elevationCenter.description: The angle of axis of the beam center to the horizontal plane. Positive upward.

eventIdentifier.description: Used to associate changes to the beam with its ActiveSonar.

scanPattern.description: The pattern that describes the angular movement of the sonar beam during its sweep.

rpr.ActiveSonarFunctionCodeEnum8.description: The current function being performed by the sonar

rpr.AdditionalPassiveActivities.description: Describes the steady state components of non-propulsion passive emissions such as those held in the Additional Narrowband Database (ANDB).

activityCode.description: Database index used to indicate the passive signature of the entity

activityParameter.description: The current state of this activity.

isSilent.description: Used to silence an additional passive activity without destroying this object.

rpr.AggregateEntity.description: A group of one or more separate objects that operate together as part of an organization. These objects may be discrete, may be other aggregate objects, or may be a mixture of both.

aggregateMarking.description: A unique marking or combination of characters used to distinguish the aggregate from other aggregates.

aggregateState.description: An indicator of the extent of association of objects form an operating group.

dimensions.description: The size of the area covered by the units in the aggregate.

entityIdentifiers.description: The identification of entities that are contained within the aggregate.

forceIdentifier.description: The identification of the force that the aggregate belongs to.

formation.description: The category of positional arrangement of the entities within the aggregate.

numberOfSilentEntities.description: The number of elements in the SilentEntities list.

numberOfVariableDatums.description: The number of records in the VariableDatums structure.

silentAggregates.description: The numbers and types, of silent aggregates contained in the aggregate. Silent aggregates are sub-aggregates that are in the aggregate, but that are not separately represented in the virtual world.

silentEntities.description: The numbers and types, of silent entities in the aggregate. Silent entities are entities that are in the aggregate, but that are not separately represented in the virtual world.

subAggregateIdentifiers.description: The identifications of aggregates represented in the virtual world that are contained in the aggregate.

variableDatums.description: Extra data that describes the aggregate.

rpr.AggregateMarkingStruct.description: Unique marking associated with an aggregate.

rpr.Aircraft.description: A platform entity that operates mainly in the air, such as aircraft, balloons, etc. This includes the entities when they are on the ground.

rpr.AmphibiousVehicle.description: A platform entity that can operate both on the land and the sea.

rpr.AmplitudeAngleModulationTypeEnum16.description: Detailed modulation types for Amplitude and Angle Modulation

rpr.AmplitudeModulationTypeEnum16.description: Detailed modulation types for Amplitude Modulation

rpr.AngleDegreeFloat32.description: Angle, based on unit degree (of arc), unit symbol °.

rpr.AngleModulationTypeEnum16.description: Detailed modulation types for Angle Modulation

rpr.AngleRadianFloat32.description: Angle, based on SI derived unit radian, unit symbol rad.

rpr.AngularVelocityRadianPerSecondFloat3.description: Angular velocity vector composed of SI base units. Based on the Angular Velocity Vector record as specified in IEEE 1278.1-1995 section 5.2.2.

rpr.AngularVelocityVectorStruct.description: The rate at which the orientation is changing over time, in body coordinates.

xAngularVelocity.description: Acceleration component about the X axis.

yAngularVelocity.description: Acceleration component about the Y axis.

zAngularVelocity.description: Acceleration component about the Z axis.

rpr.AntennaPatternTypeEnum32.description: The radiation pattern from an antenna.

rpr.AntennaPatternVariantStruct.description: Specifies the radiation pattern from the antenna, its orientation in space, and the polarization of the radiation.

rpr.AntennaPatternVariantStructLengthles.description: Represents an antenna's radiation pattern, its orientation in space, and the polarization of the radiation.

rpr.ApplicationSpecificRadioSignal.description: A radio signal that can be used for an application specific encoding scheme.

dataRate.description: The rate at which the data is being transmitted.

hostRadioIndex.description: The object instance ID of the radio transmitting this signal.

signalDataLength.description: The length of the signal data.

tDLMessageCount.description: The number of tactical data link messages contained in this signal.

tacticalDataLinkType.description: The type of tactical data link used to transmitted this signal (if any).

userProtocolID.description: The ID of the user protocol in use.

rpr.ArealObject.description: A synthetic environment object that is geometrically anchored to the terrain with a set of three or more points, which comes to a closure.

damagedAppearance.description: Specifies the damaged appearance of the object

deactivated.description: Specifies whether or not the object has been deactivated (it has ceased to exist in the synthetic environment)

flaming.description: Specifies whether or not the object is aflame

objectPreDistributed.description: Specifies whether or not the object was created before the start of the exercise

percentComplete.description: Specifies the percent completion of the object

pointsData.description: Specifies the physical location (a collection of points) of the object

smoking.description: Specifies whether or not the object is smoking (creating a smoke plume)

rpr.ArealObjectTransaction.description: An interaction for modifying instances of the ArealObject class.

damagedAppearance.description: Specifies the damaged appearance of the object

deactivated.description: Specifies whether or not the object has been deactivated (it has ceased to exist in the synthetic environment)

rpr.BaseEntity.description: A base class of aggregate and discrete scenario domain participants. The BaseEntity class is characterized by being located at a particular location in space and independently movable, if capable of movement at all. It specifically excludes elements normally considered to be a component of another element. The BaseEntity class is intended to be a container for common attributes for entities of this type. Since it lacks sufficient class specific attributes that are required for simulation purposes, federates cannot publish objects of this class. Certain simulation management federates, e.g. viewers, may subscribe to this class. Simulation federates will normally subscribe to one of the subclasses, to gain the extra information required to properly simulate the entity.

entityIdentifier.description: The unique identifier for the entity instance.

isPartOf.description: Defines if the entity if a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

rpr.EntityIdentifierStruct.description: Unique, exercise-wide identification of the entity, or a symbolic group address referencing multiple entities or a simulation application. Based on the Entity Identifier record as specified in IEEE 1278.1-1995 section 5.2.14.

entityNumber.description: Each entity in a given simulation application shall be given an entity identifier number unique to all other entities in that application. This identifier number is valid for the duration of the exercise; however, entity identifier numbers may be reused when all possible numbers have been exhausted. No entity shall have an entity identifier number of NO_ENTITY (0), ALL_ENTITIES (0xFFFF), or RQST_ASSIGN_ID (0xFFFE). The entity identifier number need not be registered or retained for future exercises. An entity identifier number equal to zero with valid site and application identification shall address a simulation application. An entity identifier number equal to ALL_ENTITIES shall mean all entities within the specified site and application. An entity identifier number equal to RQST_ASSIGN_ID allows the receiver of the CreateEntity interaction to define the entity identifier number of the new entity. The new entity will specify its entity identifier number in the Acknowledge interaction.

applicationID.description: Each simulation application (federate) at a site shall be assigned an identification number unique within that site. No simulation application shall be assigned an identification number containing NO_APPLIC (0) or ALL_APPLIC (0xFFFF). An application identification number equal to ALL_APPLIC (0xFFFF) shall mean all applications; this may be used to start all applications within a site. One or more simulation applications may reside in a single host computer. The mechanism by which application identification numbers are assigned is part of federation agreements.

siteID.description: Each site shall be assigned a unique site identification. No individual site shall be assigned an identification number containing NO_SITE (0) or ALL_SITES (0xFFFF). An identification number equal to ALL_SITES (0xFFFF) shall mean all sites; this may be used to initialize or start all sites. The mechanism by which Site Identification numbers are assigned is part of federation agreements.

rpr.RPRUserDefinedTag.description: The array shall be at least 8 bytes (octets) in size, which shall contain the time according to the DIS time stamp field format (IEEE 1278.1-1995 section 5.2.31) converted into hexadecimal American Standard Code for Information Interchange (ASCII) character representation (0-9 and A-F), with leading zeros included.  The ordering of the characters shall be in accordance with section 5.1.1 of IEEE 1278.1-1995, that is most significant octet first, with the most significant bits first (i.e. the character for bits 4-7 precedes the character for bits 0-3). This encoding is equivalent to the result of the 'C'-statement 'sprintf(UserTag, '%08X', DIStimestamp),' where 'DIStimestamp' is represented in native format.  More user-supplied information may be included, starting from the 9th character, as specified in the federation agreements.

rpr.ShaftDataStruct.description: Rotation state of a ship's propulsion shaft

currentShaftRate.description: The current shaft speed. A positive shaft speed indicates that the shaft is rotating in a clockwise direction (when viewed from the stern to bow), and a negative shaft speed indicates an anti-clockwise direction.

orderedShaftRate.description: The ordered shaft speed. If the ordered shaft speed is different from the current shaft speed then the shaft will accelerate or decelerate at the shaft rate of change. A positive shaft speed indicates that the shaft is rotating in a clockwise direction (when viewed from the stern to bow), and a negative shaft speed indicates an anti-clockwise direction.

shaftRateOfChange.description: The absolute value of the shaft's rotational acceleration. The shaft will change its rotational speed at this rate if the current shaft speed differs from the ordered shaft rate.

rpr.ShaftDataStructLengthlessArray1Plus.description: Array of propulsion shaft states, one per shaft

rpr.SignalDataLengthlessArray1Plus.description: The audio or digital data conveyed in a radio transmission.

rpr.SilentAggregateStruct.description: These fields contain information about subaggregates not registered in the federation.

aggregateType.description: This field shall specify the aggregates common to this system list.

numberOfAggregatesOfThisType.description: This field shall specify the number of aggregates that have the type specified in AggregateType field.

rpr.SilentAggregateStructLengthlessArray.description: Set of silent aggregates (aggregates not registered in the federation).

rpr.SilentEntityStruct.description: These fields contain information about entities not registered in the federation.

entityAppearance.description: This field shall specify the entity appearances of entities in the aggregate that deviate from the default. The length of the array is defined in the NumberOfAppearanceRecords field.

entityType.description: This field shall specify the entity types common to the entities in this system list.

numberOfAppearanceRecords.description: This field shall specify the number of Entity Appearance records that follow. This number shall be between zero and the number of entities of this type. Simulation applications representing the aggregate that do not model entity appearances shall set this field to zero. Simulation applications representing the aggregate that model entity appearances shall set this field to the number of entity appearances that deviate from the default appearance. Other simulations can safely assume that any entity appearances not specified are default appearances.

numberOfEntitiesOfThisType.description: This field shall specify the number of entities that have the type specified in the field EntityType.

rpr.SilentEntityStructLengthlessArray.description: A set of silent entities (entities not registered in the federation).
